methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Kvertus is a Growth-stage Defense & Security company founded by Yaroslav Filimonov and Andrii Znaichenko, having raised approximately $130M to date. The company operates within a sector containing 24 identifiable peers, comprised of 2 public comps (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private competitors including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries.

Peer-median valuation proved inapplicable to this analysis. The Defense & Security sector peer set lacks sufficient depth at Kvertus's specific stage and valuation tier—zero same-stage comparables, one adjacent-stage peer, and zero similar-tier companies were identified. A narrowly filtered multiples approach would require a minimum of three datapoints to be meaningful; relying on all-sector medians would introduce unacceptable bias given the heterogeneity of Defense & Security valuations across stage and business model. Consequently, no triangulated valuation range is supported by the quantitative methods available in this dataset.

This analysis is materially constrained by the absence of sufficiently granular comparable company data. To establish a defensible valuation range, future work should either expand the private peer dataset to capture additional Growth-stage Defense & Security companies at similar capital scales, or conduct bottom-up DCF analysis anchored to revenue projections and sector-specific margin benchmarks. The key uncertainty remains the appropriate multiple applicable to Kvertus's specific market position and technology differentiation within a fragmented competitive landscape.
